ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. There being no appearance nor an objection the Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Mar-14-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. If no appearance is made on Mar-14-2017, the court intends to dismiss the case. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
